agent-frontmatter.command: Python YAML frontmatter validation for all agents/*.md (kind: local, valid tool names)

skill-frontmatter.command: Python YAML frontmatter validation for all skills/*/SKILL.md (name/dir match)

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback reports the 'extension-builder' skill was not found. The feature specifies skillName: 'extension-builder' but the worker couldn't locate it and proceeded without it.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a Factory platform concern (skill loading during worker dispatch), not a project issue. The extension-builder skill is an infrastructure skill provided by the Factory mission system, not a skill that belongs to this declarative extension project. No action needed within the project.
